uplink.description: Full frame: battery 95%, temp 23.5C, humidity 61%, no leak (synthetic in-bounds)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TLV. Raw values (battery 95, temperature 23.5, humidity 61, water 'normal') confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js; normalized here (battery%->batteryPercent, temp->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, leak string->water.leak boolean).

uplink.description: Full frame: battery 88%, temp -3.2C, humidity 80%, leak detected (synthetic in-bounds)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TLV exercising negative two's-complement temperature and leak=true. Raw values (battery 88, temperature -3.2, humidity 80, water 'leak') confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js.
Upstream example INPUT reused. Upstream emits water 'normal'; normalized to water.leak=false.

uplink.description: Leak-only frame, leak detected (TTN example 2 bytes)
uplink._note: Upstream example INPUT reused. Upstream emits water 'leak'; normalized to water.leak=true.
Synthetic. Upstream silently returns an empty object for unknown channels; our codec reports an explicit error instead.
